prophecies.q: AI将取代医生、律师、司机等专业人士
prophecies.a: 人工智能将在未来几十年内取代大量专业人士的工作——不仅是工厂工人和卡车司机，还包括医生、律师、银行家和教师。AI诊断疾病将比人类医生更准确，AI律师将比人类律师更高效。
prophecies.q_en: AI will replace doctors, lawyers, drivers, and other professionals
prophecies.a_en: AI will replace the jobs of many professionals within decades — not just factory workers and truck drivers, but also doctors, lawyers, bankers, and teachers. AI will diagnose diseases more accurately than human doctors, and AI lawyers will be more efficient than their human counterparts.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，AI在医疗诊断（如放射科影像分析）和法律文件处理方面确实展现出超越部分人类专业人士的能力。自动驾驶出租车（Waymo）在部分城市投入商业运营。但AI尚未真正「取代」这些职业——医生、律师、司机仍大量就业。AI更多作为辅助工具而非替代者。方向正确但程度远未达到预言水平。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, AI has demonstrated capabilities exceeding some human professionals in medical diagnosis (e.g., radiology image analysis) and legal document processing. Self-driving taxis (Waymo) operate commercially in some cities. But AI has not truly 'replaced' these professions — doctors, lawyers, and drivers remain widely employed. AI serves more as an assistive tool than a replacement. The direction is correct but the degree falls far short of the prediction.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: AI将能创作艺术和音乐
prophecies.a: 人工智能将能够创作音乐、绘画、写小说，并且作品质量将达到甚至超过人类艺术家的水平。艺术不再是人类独有的领域。
prophecies.q_en: AI will create art and music
prophecies.a_en: Artificial intelligence will be able to compose music, paint, write novels, and the quality will match or exceed that of human artists. Art will no longer be an exclusively human domain.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，这一预测已基本应验：Midjourney、DALL-E、Stable Diffusion等AI可生成高质量艺术作品；Suno、Udio等AI可创作完整音乐；ChatGPT、Claude等大语言模型可写诗、写小说。AI生成的画作已在艺术竞赛中获奖（2022年Colorado State Fair），AI创作的歌曲在流媒体平台流行。艺术领域确实不再是人类独有。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, this prediction has largely come true: Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion generate high-quality art; Suno and Udio compose complete music; ChatGPT and Claude write poetry and fiction. AI-generated art won a state fair competition (Colorado, 2022), and AI-composed songs trend on streaming platforms. Art is indeed no longer an exclusively human domain.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 数据将成为最重要的资产
prophecies.a: 数据将取代土地和机械，成为最重要的经济资产。谁控制了数据流，谁就控制了未来。数据的巨头——Google、Facebook、Amazon——将比大多数国家更强大。
prophecies.q_en: Data will become the most important asset
prophecies.a_en: Data will replace land and machinery as the most important economic asset. Whoever controls the data flow controls the future. Data giants — Google, Facebook, Amazon — will become more powerful than most nations.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，这一预测高度吻合：全球市值最高的公司几乎全部是数据驱动的科技公司（Apple、Microsoft、Nvidia、Google、Amazon、Meta）。这些公司的市值超过大多数国家的GDP。AI训练数据被视为战略资源，各国围绕数据主权展开激烈博弈。欧盟GDPR和中国数据安全法的出台正是因为意识到数据的核心地位。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, this prediction closely matches reality: the world's most valuable companies are almost all data-driven tech firms (Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia, Google, Amazon, Meta). Their market caps exceed the GDP of most nations. AI training data is treated as a strategic resource, and nations compete fiercely over data sovereignty. The EU's GDPR and China's Data Security Law emerged precisely because of the recognized centrality of data.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 赫拉利关于「无用阶级」的预言
prophecies.a: AI和自动化将创造一个庞大的「无用阶级」——数十亿人在经济上变得多余，既无法就业也无法被军队需要。这将是21世纪最重大的政治和经济问题。
prophecies.q_en: Harari's prediction of the 'useless class'
prophecies.a_en: AI and automation will create a vast 'useless class' — billions economically redundant, unable to find employment or military usefulness. This will be the most significant political and economic issue of the 21st century.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在2016年《未来简史》中系统阐述了「无用阶级」概念
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari systematically articulated the 'useless class' concept in 'Homo Deus' (2016)

prophecies.q: 赫拉利关于「数据主义」作为新宗教的预言
prophecies.a: 数据主义（Dataism）将成为21世纪的新宗教。人类将不再相信上帝或人文主义，而是相信数据流。生命的意义将被归结为数据处理。
prophecies.q_en: Harari's prediction of 'Dataism' as a new religion
prophecies.a_en: Dataism will become the new religion of the 21st century. Humans will no longer believe in God or humanism, but in data flows. The meaning of life will be reduced to data processing.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在2016年《未来简史》最后一章系统阐述了数据主义概念
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari systematically articulated the Dataism concept in the final chapter of 'Homo Deus' (2016)

prophecies.q: 赫拉利关于生物黑客的预言
prophecies.a: 21世纪的关键产品不是纺织品、车辆或武器，而是身体、大脑和心灵本身。学会改造身体和心灵的人将成为新的精英。
prophecies.q_en: Harari's prediction about bio-hacking
prophecies.a_en: The key products of the 21st century won't be textiles, vehicles, or weapons, but bodies, brains, and minds. Those who learn to reengineer bodies and minds will become the new elite.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在2016年《未来简史》中将生物技术视为21世纪最具变革性的力量
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari identified biotechnology as the most transformative force of the 21st century in 'Homo Deus' (2016)

prophecies.q: 生物监控将成为常态
prophecies.a: 政府和企业将通过皮下传感器和可穿戴设备持续监控公民的生物特征数据。新冠疫情将加速这一进程——人们为了健康安全会主动接受体温、心率、血压的持续监测，而这些数据一旦被收集就不会再被放弃。
prophecies.q_en: Biometric surveillance will become the norm
prophecies.a_en: Governments and corporations will continuously monitor citizens' biometric data through under-skin sensors and wearable devices. The COVID pandemic will accelerate this process — people will accept continuous monitoring of temperature, heart rate, and blood pressure for health safety, and once collected, this data will never be relinquished.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年新冠疫情确实大幅加速了健康监控技术的采用——健康码、接触追踪应用在全球普及，Apple Watch等可穿戴设备的健康监测功能大幅扩展。但截至2025年，皮下传感器未成为主流，多数民主国家在疫情结束后缩减了大规模监控项目。监控趋势存在但程度未达预言水平。
prophecies.verdict_en: The COVID-19 pandemic did significantly accelerate health surveillance technology adoption — health codes and contact tracing apps spread globally, and wearable health monitoring expanded dramatically. However, as of 2025, under-skin sensors have not become mainstream, and most democracies scaled back mass surveillance programs post-pandemic. The trend exists but has not reached the predicted level.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 自由民主制度的危机
prophecies.a: 自由民主制度正在失去其叙事优势。20世纪自由主义战胜了法西斯主义和共产主义，但它现在无法应对技术革命带来的挑战。当算法比选民更了解政治和经济，民主选举将变得毫无意义。
prophecies.q_en: Crisis of liberal democracy
prophecies.a_en: Liberal democracy is losing its narrative advantage. In the 20th century, liberalism defeated fascism and communism, but it now cannot handle the challenges brought by the technological revolution. When algorithms understand politics and economics better than voters, democratic elections will become meaningless.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，全球民主确实面临严峻挑战：民粹主义在美欧持续上升，社交媒体算法加剧政治极化，AI生成的虚假信息干扰选举。Freedom House报告连续多年记录全球民主倒退。但自由民主制度尚未崩溃，多数民主国家仍在运转，选举仍在进行。危机趋势存在但未达「民主选举变得毫无意义」的程度。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, global democracy does face serious challenges: populism continues to rise in the US and Europe, social media algorithms intensify political polarization, and AI-generated disinformation interferes with elections. Freedom House has documented democratic backsliding for consecutive years. But liberal democracy has not collapsed — most democratic nations continue to function and hold elections. The crisis trend exists but has not reached the point where 'democratic elections become meaningless'.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 全球合作将失败
prophecies.a: 人类面临的三大全球性威胁——核战争、气候变化和技术颠覆——都需要全球层面的合作来解决，但民族主义的回潮使这种合作变得不可能。各国将选择短期国家利益而非长期人类利益。
prophecies.q_en: Global cooperation will fail
prophecies.a_en: The three existential threats facing humanity — nuclear war, climate change, and technological disruption — all require global cooperation to address, but the resurgence of nationalism makes such cooperation impossible. Nations will choose short-term national interests over long-term human interests.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，这一预测高度吻合现实：巴黎气候协定执行乏力，美国两次退出；俄乌战争和中美竞争加剧了全球地缘政治分裂；AI治理的全球合作进展缓慢，各国各自为政；WHO在疫情中的协调能力受到广泛质疑。民族主义和保护主义确实成为全球合作的主要障碍。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, this prediction closely matches reality: the Paris Climate Agreement is weakly enforced with the US withdrawing twice; the Russia-Ukraine war and US-China rivalry have deepened global geopolitical fragmentation; global cooperation on AI governance has progressed slowly with nations going their own way; WHO's coordination capacity was widely questioned during the pandemic. Nationalism and protectionism have indeed become the main obstacles to global cooperation.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: AI将操纵人类情感和决策
prophecies.a: AI不仅能分析数据，还将学会操纵人类的情感。推荐算法将精确推送能触发你特定情绪反应的内容，社交媒体将成为大规模情感操纵的工具。人类将越来越难以区分自己的「真实意愿」和被算法引导的「虚假意愿」。
prophecies.q_en: AI will manipulate human emotions and decisions
prophecies.a_en: AI will not only analyze data but learn to manipulate human emotions. Recommendation algorithms will precisely deliver content that triggers specific emotional responses, and social media will become a tool for mass emotional manipulation. Humans will find it increasingly difficult to distinguish between their 'genuine will' and 'artificial will' guided by algorithms.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，这一预测已明显应验：TikTok、YouTube、Instagram的推荐算法已被证实能有效操纵用户情绪和行为（内部文件泄露证实Facebook知道其算法加剧青少年焦虑和抑郁）。社交媒体成瘾被广泛研究，多国对算法推荐展开监管。2024年美国大选中AI生成的深度伪造内容泛滥。用户在信息茧房中难以分辨自主选择与算法引导。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, this prediction has clearly materialized: TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram recommendation algorithms have been proven to effectively manipulate user emotions and behavior (leaked internal documents confirmed Facebook knew its algorithms worsened teen anxiety and depression). Social media addiction is widely studied, and multiple countries regulate algorithmic recommendations. AI-generated deepfakes proliferated during the 2024 US election. Users in filter bubbles struggle to distinguish autonomous choices from algorithmic guidance.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 赫拉利关于算法比你更了解你自己的预言
prophecies.a: 算法将比你自己更了解你。通过分析你的生物数据和行为模式，AI将能预测你的选择、偏好甚至情绪变化，比你的自我认知更精确。
prophecies.q_en: Harari's prediction that algorithms will know you better than yourself
prophecies.a_en: Algorithms will know you better than you know yourself. By analyzing your biological data and behavioral patterns, AI will predict your choices, preferences, and emotional changes more accurately than your own self-awareness.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年，推荐算法（TikTok、YouTube、Spotify）确实能极为精准地预测用户偏好。AI大模型通过分析用户数据可推断性格特征和情绪状态。但「比你更了解你自己」的完全形态尚未实现——AI仍无法真正理解人类的内在动机和深层心理。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2025, recommendation algorithms (TikTok, YouTube, Spotify) can indeed predict user preferences with remarkable accuracy. AI models can infer personality traits and emotional states from user data. But the full form of 'knowing you better than yourself' hasn't been realized — AI still cannot truly understand human inner motivations and deep psychology.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在2018年《今日简史》中预测算法将在数年内达到深度个人化理解
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari predicted algorithms would achieve deep personal understanding within years in '21 Lessons' (2018)

prophecies.q: 赫拉利关于隐私终结的预言
prophecies.a: 隐私将在21世纪消亡。当政府和企业能够持续监控你的每一个动作、每一笔交易、每一次互动时，「隐私权」将变成一个过时的概念。
prophecies.q_en: Harari's prediction of the end of privacy
prophecies.a_en: Privacy will die in the 21st century. When governments and corporations can continuously monitor your every action, transaction, and interaction, 'the right to privacy' will become an outdated concept.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年代，数字监控无处不在。COVID疫情期间各国推行的健康码追踪系统标志着大规模监控的新阶段。社交媒体收集海量个人数据，面部识别技术部署于公共场所。但多国也在推动隐私保护立法（GDPR、中国个人信息保护法）。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 2020s, digital surveillance is ubiquitous. Health tracking systems deployed during COVID marked a new phase of mass surveillance. Social media collects vast personal data, facial recognition deploys in public spaces. However, many countries are also pushing privacy legislation (GDPR, China's PIPL).
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在2018年预测隐私将在数年内急剧萎缩，COVID-19加速了这一趋势
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari predicted privacy would shrink dramatically within years in 2018; COVID-19 accelerated this trend

prophecies.q: 赫拉利关于自由民主危机的预言
prophecies.a: 自由民主正在失去对未来的叙事能力。当科技精英掌握了操控人心的工具时，民主选举可能变得毫无意义——因为选民的意志本身就是被算法塑造的。
prophecies.q_en: Harari's prediction of liberal democracy crisis
prophecies.a_en: Liberal democracy is losing its narrative power about the future. When tech elites control tools that manipulate minds, democratic elections may become meaningless — because voters' will itself is shaped by algorithms.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2024年被称为「超级选举年」，全球超过40个国家举行选举，但AI生成的虚假信息（deepfakes）和社交媒体操控成为普遍担忧。多国选举中出现了AI干预的证据，但民主制度本身尚未崩溃——只是面临前所未有的信息操控威胁。
prophecies.verdict_en: 2024 was dubbed the 'super election year' with over 40 countries holding elections, but AI-generated disinformation (deepfakes) and social media manipulation became widespread concerns. Evidence of AI interference appeared in multiple elections, though democratic institutions haven't collapsed — they face unprecedented information manipulation threats.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利2018年预测技术将在数年内严重威胁民主运作，2024年超级选举年部分印证
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari predicted in 2018 that tech would seriously threaten democracy within years; the 2024 super election year partially confirmed this

prophecies.q: AI将掌握语言，控制人类文明
prophecies.a: AI掌握语言将是一个转折点。语言是人类文明的操作系统——法律、宗教、经济、政治都建立在语言之上。当AI能够比人类更好地运用语言时，它就获得了操纵和生成人类文明秩序的能力。
prophecies.q_en: AI will master language and control civilization
prophecies.a_en: AI mastering language will be a turning point. Language is the operating system of human civilization — law, religion, economics, and politics are all built on language. When AI can wield language better than humans, it gains the ability to manipulate and generate the cultural artifacts that underpin civilization.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，大语言模型（GPT-4、Claude等）确实在语言能力上取得了革命性突破，在许多语言任务上达到或超越人类水平：撰写法律文件、生成新闻报道、创作诗歌小说、通过律师和医生资格考试。AI已开始影响信息传播和公共话语。但AI尚未真正「控制」人类文明秩序——法律、政治和宗教体系仍由人类主导，AI更多作为工具而非自主行动者。方向高度正确，但「控制」尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2025, large language models (GPT-4, Claude, etc.) have indeed achieved revolutionary breakthroughs in language ability, matching or exceeding human performance in many tasks: writing legal documents, generating news, composing poetry and fiction, passing bar and medical exams. AI has begun influencing information dissemination and public discourse. But AI has not truly 'controlled' civilization — legal, political, and religious systems remain human-led, with AI serving as a tool rather than an autonomous agent. The direction is highly accurate, but 'control' has not been achieved.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: AI将创造「无用阶级」
prophecies.a: 随着人工智能和自动化的发展，数十亿人将变得在经济上毫无用处，形成一个庞大的「无用阶级」（useless class）。这些人不仅是失业，而是根本不可雇佣——因为他们无法做到任何AI做不到的事情。
prophecies.q_en: AI will create a 'useless class'
prophecies.a_en: As AI and automation advance, billions of people will become economically useless, forming a massive 'useless class'. These people won't just be unemployed — they will be unemployable, because they can't do anything that AI can't do better.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 算法比你更了解你自己
prophecies.a: 算法将比人类更了解自己。通过持续监控你的生物特征数据——心率、脑波、血压——算法将比你自己更早知道你的欲望、情绪和决定。
prophecies.q_en: Algorithms will know you better than you know yourself
prophecies.a_en: Algorithms will know humans better than they know themselves. By constantly monitoring your biometric data — heart rate, brain waves, blood pressure — algorithms will know your desires, emotions, and decisions before you do.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 数据主义将成为新宗教
prophecies.a: 数据主义（Dataism）将取代人文主义，成为21世纪的主导意识形态。在数据主义看来，宇宙由数据流构成，任何现象或实体的价值取决于它对数据处理的贡献。人类不过是生化算法，与计算机算法并无本质区别。
prophecies.q_en: Dataism will become the new religion
prophecies.a_en: Dataism will replace humanism as the dominant ideology of the 21st century. In the dataist worldview, the universe consists of data flows, and the value of any phenomenon or entity is determined by its contribution to data processing. Humans are merely biochemical algorithms, no different in essence from computer algorithms.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 隐私的终结
prophecies.a: 隐私将成为一个过时的概念。当算法可以通过你的生物特征数据推断你的性取向、政治倾向和情绪状态时，隐私就不再有意义。人类将生活在一个「全透明」的世界里。
prophecies.q_en: The end of privacy
prophecies.a_en: Privacy will become an obsolete concept. When algorithms can infer your sexual orientation, political leanings, and emotional state from your biometric data, privacy becomes meaningless. Humans will live in a 'fully transparent' world.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 人类将变得「可被黑客入侵」
prophecies.a: 人类有机体将变得可以被黑客入侵。通过理解人类的生化机制和收集足够的生物数据，外部系统可以预测和操纵人的欲望、决策和情绪——就像黑客入侵计算机一样。
prophecies.q_en: Humans will become 'hackable'
prophecies.a_en: The human organism will become hackable. By understanding human biochemistry and collecting enough biometric data, external systems can predict and manipulate human desires, decisions, and emotions — just like hacking a computer.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"

prophecies.q: 「升级人类」与「自然人类」之间的不平等
prophecies.a: 生物技术将使富人能够升级自己的身体和大脑，创造出一个生物学意义上的上层阶级。人类可能分裂为两个物种：拥有增强能力的「神人」（Homo Deus）和未经升级的普通人。这将是人类历史上第一次真正的生物学不平等。
prophecies.q_en: Inequality between 'upgraded' and 'natural' humans
prophecies.a_en: Biotechnology will enable the rich to upgrade their bodies and brains, creating a biological upper class. Humanity may split into two species: enhanced 'god-men' (Homo Deus) with augmented abilities and unenhanced ordinary people. This will be the first true biological inequality in human history.
prophecies.yearReason: 赫拉利在《未来简史》等著作中推断该时间范围
prophecies.yearReason_en: Harari projected this timeframe in works such as "Homo Deus"
